allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/generate -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"MiniMax-M2.7","contents":"测试","config":{"systemInstruction":"你是一个助手。**所有输出必须使用中文。**以 JSON 格式输出，格式为：{summary: string, recommendations: string[], memeRanking: array, recentTopics: array}","responseMimeType":"application/json"}}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/generate -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"MiniMax-M2.7","contents":"测试","config":{"systemInstruction":"你是一个助手。","responseMimeType":"application/json"}}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/generate -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"MiniMax-M2.7","contents":"群组 \\"ACG 深夜食堂\\" 的聊天历史：\\n测试消息","config":{"systemInstruction":"你是一个名为 \\"ACG 深夜食堂\\" 群聊的得力助手。\\n你的任务是：\\n1. 简要总结对话，重点关注群组的特定主题（例如，如果是游戏群，关注比赛、策略或硬件）。\\n2. 建议3个符合群组氛围的机智回复。\\n3. 识别聊天中使用的\\"梗\\"或\\"社区黑话\\"。\\n4. 为这些梗创建一个排名。\\n5. 识别正在讨论的3个最新话题。为每个话题提供标题、简要描述和\\"社交切入口\\"——关于用户如何加入讨论的建议。\\n**所有输出必须使用中文。**\\n以 JSON 格式输出。","responseMimeType":"application/json","responseSchema":{"type":"OBJECT","properties":{"summary":{"type":"STRING"},"recommendations":{"type":"ARRAY","items":{"type":"STRING"}},"memeRanking":{"type":"ARRAY","items":{"type":"OBJECT","properties":{"meme":{"type":"STRING"},"count":{"type":"NUMBER"},"description":{"type":"STRING"},"examples":{"type":"ARRAY","items":{"type":"OBJECT","properties":{"userName":{"type":"STRING"},"text":{"type":"STRING"}}}}}}},"recentTopics":{"type":"ARRAY","items":{"type":"OBJECT","properties":{"title":{"type":"STRING"},"description":{"type":"STRING"},"entryPoint":{"type":"STRING"}}}}}}}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/generate -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"MiniMax-M2.7","contents":"test","config":{"systemInstruction":"Respond with JSON: {summary: string, recommendations: string[]}","responseMimeType":"application/json","responseSchema":{"type":"OBJECT","properties":{"summary":{"type":"STRING"},"recommendations":{"type":"ARRAY","items":{"type":"STRING"}}}}}}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/generate -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"MiniMax-M2.7","contents":"群组 \\"ACG 深夜食堂\\" 的聊天历史：\\n测试消息","config":{"systemInstruction":"你是一个名为 \\"ACG 深夜食堂\\" 群聊的得力助手。你的任务是：1. 简要总结对话。2. 建议3个符合群组氛围的机智回复。3. 识别聊天中使用的\\"梗\\"。4. 为这些梗创建一个排名。5. 识别正在讨论的3个最新话题。**所有输出必须使用中文。**以 JSON 格式输出，格式：{summary: string, recommendations: string[], memeRanking: array, recentTopics: array}","responseMimeType":"application/json"}}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/generate -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"MiniMax-M2.7","contents":"群组 \\"游戏开黑组\\" 的聊天历史：\\n野区萧瑟: 晚上8点准时集合，有人要打排位吗？最近那个新版本打野刀削弱太狠了，我得练练新套路。\\n辅助不辅助: 我可以！但我只会保排辅助，别让我玩开团。\\n李四: 晚上8点上号，不见不散！","config":{"systemInstruction":"你是 \\"游戏开黑组\\" 群聊助手。输出JSON：{summary, recommendations, memeRanking, recentTopics}","responseMimeType":"application/json"}}')
